calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-25-2010 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2010 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion To Compel Pmk Deposition Of Deft Globetrack Wireless,Inc. And Request For Request For Sancitons In The Amount Of $1,994.40
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff DANIEL MCKELVEY's Motion To Compel PMK Deposition Of Defendant Globetrack Wireless, Inc., And Request For Sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to appear for its deposition, to be noticed by Plaintiff, and to complete that deposition no later than March 11, 2010. Defendant's failure to appear for its deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $1,094, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-06-2010 Text Ruling
